# Elicitation.IsValidElicitationUrl method

Returns `true` when *url* is a valid, absolute URI/URL — the requirement on the url-mode `url` field (spec §20.3, R-20.3-m, R-20.3-n). Relative references and malformed strings are rejected.

```csharp
public static bool IsValidElicitationUrl(string? url)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| url | The candidate URL. |

## Return Value

`true` when a valid absolute URL.
